title: RGCS acquisition configuration
description: Sampling, channel, and I/Q configuration for one run. Binding rules (DYNAMIC_COHERENCE_SPEC.md section 3): single-shot capture (no cross-run averaging before coherence analysis); acquisition extends >= 2.5x past drive-off for coherence claims; sensor aperture and positions are first-class metadata (spatial low-pass, KOS-11); n_runs >= 100 for ensemble phase statistics.

single_shot.description: True = each run stored individually with no averaging across excitation cycles. Required true for coherence/phase analysis.

n_runs.description: Repeated independent runs in this configuration. >= 100 required before ensemble-phase (Rayleigh) claims; KOS used 1000.

post_drive_ratio.description: (duration_s - drive_off_time_s)/drive_off_time_s. Must be >= 2.5 for any coherence claim (KOS-12 rule); values below 2.5 restrict the run to amplitude-only analysis.

lo_derivation.description: How the LO derives from the shared reference.

shared_reference.description: Must be true (and match drive_config.reference_clock.shared) for phase claims.

units.description: Observable unit X declared per campaign (NOTATION_AND_UNITS.md 2.8), e.g. 'm/s', 'V', 'Pa', 'g'.

position_xyz_mm.description: Sensor position in the bench frame; REQUIRED metadata for spatial-mapping and parity analysis. x follows the female-apex frame for on-axis sensors.

axis_x_mm.description: On-axis coordinate (female-apex frame) for axial-scan channels.

aperture_mm.description: Sensor contact/sensing aperture; acts as a spatial low-pass filter on mode shapes (KOS-11; golden case (g)).

sensor_mass_g.description: Contact-sensor added mass - itself a loading artifact to check.

instrument_chain.description: Ordered parts list of the detection chain (KOS-05 discipline).

artifact_register_ref.description: Path to the campaign's known-instrument-artifact register (KOS-14). Required before Stage-III-type claims.
